subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-04-16 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: After my departure there will be a short time of quiet in the Baha'i Cause. Then the flame of love and activity... bury me between Haifa and Akka in the sands there, for it is the pathway of the loved ones and pilgrims. Build nothing over it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از من معرکه می شود.  خدا اسباب فراهم آورده که من باشم و نباشم تا احباب در اطراف بر ایشان فتوری حاصل نشود
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @law of burial and cremation, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @firmness in the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @Christ; Christianity
